menu.start: Welcome to Adamant Stars 🏪 This bot is designed for purchasing Telegram Stars without KYC verification at the lowest prices. By using this bot, you confirm that you have read and agree to: 👤 Terms of Service 🔒 Privacy Policy

buy_list.self: Select the product you want to buy ⬇

stars.self: Enter the number of stars you need 🪙 🏷 Minimum: {MIN_STARS} 🏷 Maximum: {MAX_STARS} 👤 Sending to account: @{username}
stars.amount_error: Please send a valid number of stars you want to buy 🪙 🏷 Minimum: {MIN_STARS} 🏷 Maximum: {MAX_STARS} 👤 Sending to account: @{username}
stars.username_self_error: Your account does not have a username ❗️ Please set one, otherwise we will not be able to send you the product without it
stars.username_error: Please verify that the username is correct ❗️ This username did not pass the basic check. Make sure it is correct and try again
stars.username: Please enter the username of the account to which the stars will be sent ⌨ Make sure the username is real ❗️
stars.correct_form: Please use the format: /stars username amount For example: /stars durov 100

premium.self: Select the Telegram Premium subscription you need 👥 👤 Sending to account: @{username}
premium.username: Please enter the username of the account to which the Premium subscription will be sent ⌨ Make sure the username is real ❗️
premium.username_self_error: Your account does not have a username ❗️ Please set one, otherwise we will not be able to send you the product without it
premium.username_error: Please verify that the username is correct ❗️ This username did not pass the basic check. Make sure it is correct and try again
premium.already_has: Please verify that the username is correct ❗️ The username is correct, but this account already has a Telegram Premium subscription. Please try again with a different account

gifts.comment_input: Send a comment for the gift ⌨ You can send up to 255 characters.
gifts.username: Please enter the username of the account to which the gift will be sent ⌨ Make sure the username is real ❗️
gifts.selected: Would you like to add a comment to the gift? ⌨ 🖋 You can write any comment to the gift up to 255 characters, it will be sent along with the gift You selected the gift: {emojiIcon}

menu.support: You can contact support via the link below <tg-emoji emoji-id='5348390385636883361'>⬇</tg-emoji>

menu.profile: 👤 User information for {username} ✈️ Telegram ID: {tg_id} ⭐️ Stars purchased: {stars_spend} 💎 Rank: {value} 🔒 Ban status: {is_banned} 👛 Adamant Balance: {adamant_balance} coins

admin.true: Hello dear administrator, what would you like to do?
admin.user_info: Information about user @{username} 👤 Telegram ID: {tg_id} 🪪 Stars purchased: {stars_spend} 💫 Rank: {value} Ban status: {is_banned} 👛 Adamant Balance: {adamant_balance} coins
admin.logs: The file with all current logs is above <tg-emoji emoji-id='5469718869536940860'>👆</tg-emoji>
admin.clear_logs: All logs have been successfully cleared 🗑 The file with all old logs is above 👆

admin.info: Global Bot Information Users in database: {users_count} 👤 Via referral system: {came_by_referal} Stars purchased: {stars_bought} ({dollar_stars}$) Via Adamant Balance: {via_adamant_stars} ({via_adamant_stars_usd}$) Via TON: {via_ton_stars} ({via_ton_stars_usd}$) Via Cryptomus: {via_cryptomus_stars} ({via_cryptomus_stars_usd}$) Total completed orders: {completed_orders}

payment.ton: ❗️ Invoice is valid for 30 minutes Order details ☑ {description} Payment details 💳 Network: TON 💱 Amount: {amount_ton} 💰 Address: {wallet} Comment (memo): {order_id} ❗️ Send the exact amount and comment to the specified address, otherwise the payment WILL NOT BE COUNTED

slow.usd: ❗️ Automatic payment via this method is not yet available We sincerely apologize and hope it will be available soon. In the meantime, you can top up your Adamant Balance via support below ⬇ You can transfer any desired amount to the cards: 💳 Visa: 4297140070403256 (F.G.) 💳 MasterCard: 5259357077807353 (F.G.) ❗️ If you do not contact support within half an hour of sending, your top-up WILL NOT BE COUNTED. Please also immediately send your receipt and Telegram ID (/id) for maximum processing speed
slow.uzs: ❗️ Automatic payment via this method is not yet available We sincerely apologize and hope it will be available soon. In the meantime, you can top up your Adamant Balance via support below ⬇ You can transfer any desired amount to the cards: 💳 Uzcard: 5614685200470271 (F.G.) ❗️ If you do not contact support within half an hour of sending, your top-up WILL NOT BE COUNTED. Please also immediately send your receipt and Telegram ID (/id) for maximum processing speed

payment.cryptomus: ❗️ Invoice is valid for 1 hour Order details ☑ {amount} Telegram Stars to @{username} 👤 Payment details 💳 Network: Cryptomus 💱 Amount: {amount_usd} 💰 Payment link: {link} ❗️ Pay the order via the link in the details or using the button below (both options are identical)
payment.success: 🎉 Payment received 🎉 Order details ☑ Network: {provider} Amount: {cost} 💰 Product: {product} Recipient: @{username} 👤 ❗️ If you have not yet received your order, please wait a few minutes ⏳
payment.source: Select a payment method from the options below ⬇ 👛 Adamant Balance: {adamant_balance}
payment.top_up: Your Adamant Balance has been successfully topped up by {amount} coins 💰 Your current balance is: {balance} coins

referal.self: Here is your referral link: {link} People who came via your referral link Users: {came} 👤 Stars earned: {stars_bought} ({dollar_stars}$) Your share: {users_money} coins ❗️ All your earnings are automatically added to your Adamant Balance

error.balance: You do not have enough coins in your Adamant Balance 🚫
error.not_yet: This feature is not yet available... 🚫
error.critical_error: A critical error has occurred ❗️ Please try again later and contact support...
error.fragment: A critical error has occurred ❗️ You made a payment, but your order did not go through. Please contact support and we will definitely help you 🙏
error.fragment_retry: Temporary order processing error ❗️ We will automatically retry. Attempt: {attempt}/{max_attempts}
error.adamant_not_charged: An error occurred while processing the order ❗️ Coins were not deducted from your Adamant Balance. Please try again later or contact support.
